cards.back: A push or pull that can change motion.
A force that opposes movement between touching surfaces.

cards.front: Give an example of a push force.
cards.back: Pushing a trolley or closing a door.

cards.front: Give an example of a pull force.

cards.back: Equal forces in opposite directions causing no change in motion.
Forces that are unequal, causing acceleration or direction change.
A net force can start, stop, speed up, slow down, or turn an object.
